account_owners_one_owner.name: account_owners_one_owner
account_owners_one_owner.value:
("account_owners"."family_member_id" IS NOT NULL)::int
        + ("account_owners"."entity_id" IS NOT NULL)::int
        + ("account_owners"."external_beneficiary_id" IS NOT NULL)::int = 1

asset_transactions_sell_source_check.name: asset_transactions_sell_source_check
asset_transactions_sell_source_check.value:
"asset_transactions"."type" <> 'sell' OR (
      (CASE WHEN "asset_transactions"."account_id" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
      (CASE WHEN "asset_transactions"."purchase_transaction_id" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
      (CASE WHEN "asset_transactions"."business_account_id" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
    ) <= 1

asset_transactions_buy_no_source_check.name: asset_transactions_buy_no_source_check
asset_transactions_buy_no_source_check.value: "asset_transactions"."type" <> 'buy' OR ("asset_transactions"."purchase_transaction_id" IS NULL AND "asset_transactions"."account_id" IS NULL AND "asset_transactions"."business_account_id" IS NULL AND "asset_transactions"."fraction_sold" IS NULL)

entity_owners_one_owner.name: entity_owners_one_owner
entity_owners_one_owner.value:
("entity_owners"."family_member_id" IS NOT NULL)::int
        + ("entity_owners"."owner_entity_id" IS NOT NULL)::int = 1

expenses_one_owner.name: expenses_one_owner
expenses_one_owner.value: ("expenses"."owner_entity_id" IS NOT NULL)::int + ("expenses"."owner_account_id" IS NOT NULL)::int <= 1

gifts_event_kind.name: gifts_event_kind
gifts_event_kind.value:
(
        ("gifts"."amount" IS NOT NULL AND "gifts"."account_id" IS NULL AND "gifts"."liability_id" IS NULL AND "gifts"."percent" IS NULL AND "gifts"."business_entity_id" IS NULL)
        OR
        (("gifts"."account_id" IS NOT NULL OR "gifts"."liability_id" IS NOT NULL)
         AND "gifts"."percent" IS NOT NULL
         AND NOT ("gifts"."account_id" IS NOT NULL AND "gifts"."liability_id" IS NOT NULL)
         AND "gifts"."business_entity_id" IS NULL)
        OR
        ("gifts"."business_entity_id" IS NOT NULL AND "gifts"."percent" IS NOT NULL AND "gifts"."account_id" IS NULL AND "gifts"."liability_id" IS NULL AND "gifts"."recipient_entity_id" IS NOT NULL)
      )

incomes_one_owner.name: incomes_one_owner
incomes_one_owner.value: ("incomes"."owner_entity_id" IS NOT NULL)::int + ("incomes"."owner_account_id" IS NOT NULL)::int <= 1

liability_owners_one_owner.name: liability_owners_one_owner
liability_owners_one_owner.value: ("liability_owners"."family_member_id" IS NOT NULL)::int + ("liability_owners"."entity_id" IS NOT NULL)::int = 1

note_receivable_owners_one_owner.name: note_receivable_owners_one_owner
note_receivable_owners_one_owner.value:
("note_receivable_owners"."family_member_id" IS NOT NULL)::int
        + ("note_receivable_owners"."entity_id" IS NOT NULL)::int
        + ("note_receivable_owners"."external_beneficiary_id" IS NOT NULL)::int = 1

subscription_items_addon_key_when_addon.name: subscription_items_addon_key_when_addon
subscription_items_addon_key_when_addon.value: ("subscription_items"."kind" = 'addon' AND "subscription_items"."addon_key" IS NOT NULL) OR ("subscription_items"."kind" = 'seat' AND "subscription_items"."addon_key" IS NULL)

split_interest_unitrust_payout.name: split_interest_unitrust_payout
split_interest_unitrust_payout.value: ("trust_split_interest_details"."payout_type" != 'unitrust') OR ("trust_split_interest_details"."payout_percent" IS NOT NULL AND "trust_split_interest_details"."payout_amount" IS NULL)

split_interest_annuity_payout.name: split_interest_annuity_payout
split_interest_annuity_payout.value: ("trust_split_interest_details"."payout_type" != 'annuity') OR ("trust_split_interest_details"."payout_amount" IS NOT NULL AND "trust_split_interest_details"."payout_percent" IS NULL)

split_interest_term_years_required.name: split_interest_term_years_required
split_interest_term_years_required.value: ("trust_split_interest_details"."term_type" NOT IN ('years', 'shorter_of_years_or_life')) OR ("trust_split_interest_details"."term_years" IS NOT NULL)

split_interest_measuring_life_required.name: split_interest_measuring_life_required
split_interest_measuring_life_required.value: ("trust_split_interest_details"."term_type" NOT IN ('single_life', 'joint_life', 'shorter_of_years_or_life')) OR ("trust_split_interest_details"."measuring_life_1_id" IS NOT NULL)
